description: Multi-module investment intelligence dashboard. Regime-aware, AI-powered, built for independent investors.

modules.name: Risk Regime
modules.description: Cross-asset risk-on/off indicator. 17+ z-score signals, daily history.

modules.name: Narrative Discovery
modules.description: AI-grouped ticker discovery by narrative themes. Auto-refreshes every 4h.

modules.name: Insider & Congress
modules.description: Form 4 insider trades and Congress trading activity.

modules.name: Options Activity
modules.description: Options flow analysis with unusual activity sentiment.

modules.name: Valuation
modules.description: AI rating + 2-stage levered DCF with CAPM discount rate, sector profiles, Kelly sizing.

qir_patterns.name: BULLISH_CONFIRMATION
qir_patterns.description: All three timing layers aligned bullish — highest-conviction long entry.

qir_patterns.name: BEARISH_CONFIRMATION
qir_patterns.description: All three layers aligned bearish — highest-conviction short or cash environment.

qir_patterns.name: PULLBACK_IN_UPTREND
qir_patterns.description: Regime + Options Flow confirm bull trend — Tactical dip is a buy-the-dip setup.

qir_patterns.name: OPTIONS_FLOW_DIVERGENCE
qir_patterns.description: Regime + Tactical bullish but options crowd hedging — smart money buying protection.

qir_patterns.name: BEAR_MARKET_BOUNCE
qir_patterns.description: Regime bearish but Tactical + Options show short-term bounce — trade the bounce, not the trend.

qir_patterns.name: LATE_CYCLE_SQUEEZE
qir_patterns.description: Regime bearish, Tactical neutral, Options bullish — gamma squeeze risk, stay defensive.

qir_patterns.name: GENUINE_UNCERTAINTY
qir_patterns.description: No clear alignment across layers — reduce size, wait for confluence.

signal_layers.regime: Structural macro (weeks–months): FRED data, z-scores, yield curve, credit spreads, VIX, M2, Sahm rule.
signal_layers.tactical: Medium-term (days–weeks): price momentum, breadth, RSI, moving average crossovers.
signal_layers.options_flow: Short-term (hours–days): put/call ratio, unusual activity, gamma exposure.

dcf_methodology: 2-stage levered DCF. CAPM discount rate using live market beta + Damodaran sector unlevered beta re-levered with D/E ratio. Regime-adjusted ERP: 5.0% risk-on, 5.5% neutral, 6.0% risk-off. Bear/Base/Bull scenarios ±35% growth adjustment. Sensitivity grid: WACC ±100bps × terminal growth ±50bps.
